text: I am going to school today
She is cooking dinner for us
We are watching a movie tonight
He is reading a book quietly
I need to finish my assignment
They are building a new house
We are going to the market
Yeye ni rafiki yangu wa karibu
uyu ni murata wakwa wa karibu
